network_summary: SPECIALIST EXCLUSION — all 3 locations in Scott Goldman's AO cluster carry pediatric dentistry taxonomy (1223P0221X). Scott Goldman DDS is a licensed Illinois pediatric dentist who has owned/operated pediatric-only practices in Chicagoland (Arlington Heights, Elgin, Oak Lawn). He is also associated with SALT Dental Collective as a Clinical Director (a pediatric DSO platform), but his Illinois AO-linked NPIs all represent pediatric specialty practices, not GP practices. This network must be excluded from the GP denominator census entirely.

mso_platform_pe_evidence: SALT Dental Collective: Scott Goldman is listed as Clinical Director at SALT Dental Collective (saltdentalpartners.com, LinkedIn). SALT Dental Partners is a pediatric DSO platform. However this connection describes a professional role, not direct PE/MSO ownership of the three IL NPIs listed. No documentary evidence found that the three IL PCs are under a SALT management agreement or PE ownership structure. SALT is therefore an open investigative lead, not confirmed ownership evidence for this cluster.
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: NPI 1447673777 (Metro Kidz Dental, Oak Lawn) is classified org_only_npi — organization NPI registered but 0 individual providers at address; may be a closed or shell location. The phone number on the JSON cluster (709-499-0900) differs from the NPPES record (708-499-0500), suggesting possible data entry error in source. NPI 1265717276 (Elgin) already carries dso_regional / All Family Dental & Braces — the AO-cluster grouping under Goldman may reflect his role as a contracted/affiliated dentist at a UDP-managed location rather than independent ownership.
evidence_chain: AO signal: SCOTT GOLDMAN appears as authorized official on 3 IL pediatric NPIs across 3 ZIPs (60004 Arlington Heights, 60123 Elgin, 60453 Oak Lawn). Web corroboration: LinkedIn confirms Scott Goldman DDS is a pediatric dentist in Illinois with multiple private practices, and also a Clinical Director at SALT Dental Collective (pediatric DSO). DentalPlans.com and CareCredit listings confirm his pediatric-only practice scope. All three NPIs carry taxonomy 1223P0221X (Pediatric Dentistry). SPECIALIST EXCLUSION TRIGGERED: pediatric dentistry = specialist per project taxonomy rules (1223P prefix). This network is excluded from GP denominator census.
future_app_notes: If SALT Dental Collective expands investigation later: verify whether any of Goldman's IL PCs signed a management services agreement with SALT Dental Partners. The Elgin location (NPI 1265717276) is already flagged dso_regional / All Family Dental — that classification should be reviewed separately for accuracy (is this actually a UDP/All Family location, or was it misclassified?). Oak Lawn Metro Kidz Dental org_only_npi may be a closed location. All three locations are pediatric-only and should remain outside GP census regardless of ownership resolution.
